description_long: This bistro is a rectangular, single-story commercial building with a modern, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of horizontal wooden slats and black paneling, giving it a contemporary and inviting appearance. Large white-framed windows and doors are visible on the front facade, allowing natural light to enter and providing a view of the interior. The roof is flat and partially open, revealing some of the internal layout, including seating and service areas. The side and rear walls are mostly solid, with minimal fenestration, emphasizing privacy and a streamlined look. The overall structure suggests a cozy, urban eatery designed for both comfort and style.
description: A modern, rectangular bistro with wood and black paneling, large front windows, and a flat roof. The design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, white doors, and a mix of wood and black paneling, highlighting the main entrance and inviting facade.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid black paneling and minimal openings, emphasizing privacy and structural simplicity.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by horizontal wood and black panels, with no visible windows or doors, presenting a closed-off appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with solid black paneling and a glimpse of the internal layout through the roof opening.
